faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Webflow vs Custom Development (React): Which to choose in 2026?
faq.a1: It depends on the project. Webflow is unbeatable for corporate sites and marketing (speed, SEO, and native CMS). But if you need complex business logic, admin dashboards, or deep integrations, I build custom apps with React and Node.js. Often, the best approach today is hybrid.
faq.q2: How do you integrate Artificial Intelligence (AI Automation) into web development?
faq.a2: It's not just about chatbots, but about architectures that automate operations. I implement autonomous AI agents for customer support, ticket generation, data extraction, and dynamic content optimization, drastically reducing operational costs.
faq.q3: Do Core Web Vitals really impact client acquisition?
faq.a3: Absolutely. In 2026, speed isn't just UX, it's SEO. If your site takes more than 2 seconds to load, Google will prioritize your competitors. My development guarantees Lighthouse scores of 95+, which directly impacts your conversion rate and organic traffic.
faq.q4: Is it safe to migrate from WordPress to Webflow or headless tech without losing traffic?
faq.a4: Yes, if done with an expert strategy. I've led full global migrations (like at Inconcert) preserving 100% of organic traffic through exhaustive 301 URL mapping, semantic structuring, and fast architectures optimized for both bots and users.
faq.q5: What makes you different from a traditional agency or a standard developer?
faq.a5: My background isn't only code. I worked for 7 years in financial operations, auditing, and real estate. This allows me to understand your business: every development hour must have a clear ROI, meet strict deadlines, and align with real commercial metrics.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Ivan Elias Roldan, residing in Brazil, is committed to protecting the privacy of users of this website, in compliance with applicable Personal Data Protection regulations.
privacy.section1.title: 1. Data we collect
privacy.section1.content:
We may collect the following personal data when you use our site:

- Data provided voluntarily: name, phone number, email address, and project details, when you contact us via the form or WhatsApp.
- Browsing data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, session duration, and similar data, collected through cookies and analytics tools.
privacy.section2.title: 2. Purpose of processing
privacy.section2.content:
Your personal data will be used exclusively to:

- Respond to inquiries and professional service requests.
- Coordinate technical meetings or calls.
- Send quotes and communications related to the requested service.
- Improve the user experience on our website.
- Perform anonymous internal statistical analysis.
privacy.section3.title: 3. Cookies
privacy.section3.content:
Our site uses cookies. You can choose to accept or configure the categories:

- Essential: necessary for the operation of the site.
- Analytical (Google Analytics): allow us to understand how the site is used to improve it.
- Marketing: allow the personalization of ads on social networks.
privacy.section4.title: 4. Data transfer
privacy.section4.content: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties, except when necessary to provide the requested service or required by a competent authority.
privacy.section5.title: 5. Security
privacy.section5.content: We adopt reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.section6.title: 6. Your rights
privacy.section6.content: As a personal data subject, you have the right to Access, Rectification, Erasure, and Objection. To exercise these rights, write to us through the contact channels on this site.
privacy.section7.title: 7. Control authority
privacy.section7.content: The National Data Protection Authority (ANPD) is the control body in Brazil.
privacy.section8.title: 8. Modifications
privacy.section8.content: We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. Changes will be published on this page.
privacy.section9.title: 9. Contact
privacy.section9.content: For privacy inquiries, contact us via email or WhatsApp, available in the contact section.
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions regulate the use of Ivan Elias Roldan's website. By accessing and using this site, you accept these terms in their entirety.
terms.section1.title: 1. Services
terms.section1.content: Ivan Elias Roldan offers web development, technical consulting, and automation services. The site is an informative medium; specific conditions for each project are agreed upon individually.
terms.section2.title: 2. Use of the site
terms.section2.content: By using this site, you agree not to use it for illegal purposes, not to attempt to access restricted areas, not to introduce malicious code, and to provide truthful information.
terms.section3.title: 3. Intellectual property
terms.section3.content: All site content (texts, images, logos, design, source code) is the property of Ivan Elias Roldan or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.section4.title: 4. Quotes and prices
terms.section4.content: Quotes are prepared on a personalized basis. All quotes are valid for 15 calendar days from their issuance, unless otherwise stated.
terms.section5.title: 5. Service warranty
terms.section5.content: Each development includes a previously agreed support and warranty period, covering implementation errors under normal conditions of use.
terms.section6.title: 6. Limitation of liability
terms.section6.content: We are not responsible for temporary interruptions of the web service. The published information is for guidance and does not constitute a binding contractual offer.
terms.section7.title: 7. Third-party links
terms.section7.content: The site may contain links to external sites (GitHub, LinkedIn, WhatsApp). We are not responsible for the content or policies of these sites.
terms.section8.title: 8. Applicable law and jurisdiction
terms.section8.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of Brazil. Any controversy will be submitted to the competent courts of Brazil.
terms.section9.title: 9. Modifications
terms.section9.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use implies acceptance of them.

about.title: About me
about.description:
I'm Ivan Roldan, a frontend developer with 5+ years of experience building digital products that combine design, performance, and business logic. I led a global WordPress-to-Webflow migration at Inconcert, built full-stack applications with React and Node.js at RollingCode, and as a freelancer I create high-impact websites for independent clients. 

What sets me apart: before becoming a developer, I spent 7 years in operations, financial auditing, and real estate planning. That gave me a business perspective most developers don't have — I understand costs, timelines, processes, and how to translate business goals into concrete technical solutions.
